_meta.failure_shape: v2.6.0 Live-data wiring — failure mode: backend was wired live (extracted 71 facts + 13 persons via real LLM pipeline) but client workspace still mock-wired for documents/facts (never shows extraction status, never fetches live document list, sidebar never surfaces extracted people). The four-pattern residue: mock fixture import survives, mock-flag env-var unset path falls back, `?? mockDocuments` fallback uncovered, MSW handler in production code path.
_meta.originating_failure: heirship-app-v3 transcript: 'the backend extracted 71 facts + 13 persons (confirmed), but the client workspace is still mock-wired for documents/facts — it never shows extraction status (no pending/processing/done-with-facts), never fetches the live document list, and the sidebar never surfaces the extracted people. That's a real wiring gap, exactly matching what you saw.' The mandate was live-data wiring; the prior frontend round-trip applied the spec's UI but never removed pre-existing mock state.
